title: U.S., Iran prepare for peace talks with a gulf separating the two sides
summary_full: Amid allegations of bad faith and ceasefire violations from both Washington and Tehran, negotiators arrived in Islamabad for high-stakes talks.
summary_public: Amid allegations of bad faith and ceasefire violations from both Washington and Tehran, negotiators arrived in Islamabad for high-stakes talks.

IR.label: mixed
